metadata.title: Write a Book with AI | Create KDP-Ready EPUB in 15 Minutes
metadata.description: Turn your expertise into a publish-ready book with AI. Generate drafts, covers, and EPUB/PDF output in 5 questions. Preview for free — no credit card required.
metadata.ogDescription: Turn your expertise into a publish-ready book in 15 minutes. Preview for free.

middleBlock.title: Write a Book with AI: Turn Your Idea into EPUB and PDF
middleBlock.description: Turn your expertise into a publish-ready book with Book Creator. AI-powered draft generation, cover design, and KDP-compatible EPUB/PDF output in a single workflow.
middleBlock.subDescription: Preview your book for free, unlock full access when you like it. Start immediately — no credit card required.

a.title: For Educators, Consultants, and Content Creators
a.description: An AI-powered book writing platform for anyone who wants to turn their expertise into a KDP book. E-book creation is now a single workflow.

b.title: No More Blank Page or Scattered Tools
b.description: Write your book with AI — draft, content, and output all on one platform. Complete your book without needing different tools.

c.title: KDP-Compatible EPUB and PDF Files
c.description: Editable chapters, professional cover, and publish-ready EPUB + PDF outputs. Compatible with Kindle and KDP.

pricing.title: Prepare Your First Book for $4 — KDP-Ready EPUB and PDF Included
pricing.description: Access a complete book for $4: AI-powered draft, professional cover, EPUB and PDF outputs. Preview for free, then unlock full access.

heading.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Writing a Book with AI
heading.description: How does the AI book creator work, what's the output quality, and is it KDP-compatible? The most critical questions about the book writing process.

quality.question: Can an AI-written book really be high quality?
quality.answer: AI creates the draft — you control the quality. Edit every chapter, regenerate what you don't like. {kdpLiveBooksClaim} of our books are live with a {kdpGuaranteeClaim} guarantee.

duration.question: How long does it take to write a book with AI?
duration.answer: Enter your topic and get a publish-ready EPUB and PDF in 30–90 minutes. Most books are completed in a single session. According to user surveys, 92% of authors publish within 7 days compared to 3-6 months with traditional writing methods.

kdp.question: Can I upload the EPUB and PDF outputs directly to KDP?
kdp.answer: Yes. You get KDP-compatible EPUB and PDF outputs. We recommend a final review with your own checklist before uploading.

creditCard.question: ¿Necesito una tarjeta de crédito para comenzar?
creditCard.answer: No. Comienza con una vista previa gratuita — explora el borrador, la portada y el esquema de tu libro sin ingresar información de pago. Actualiza solo cuando estés satisfecho con el resultado.

formats.question: ¿Qué formatos de salida están disponibles?
formats.answer: Recibes EPUB (para Kindle y todos los lectores de libros electrónicos), PDF (para impresión bajo demanda) y una vista previa HTML compartible. Todos los resultados son editables y listos para KDP.

cta.title: Start Writing Your Book with AI Today
cta.description: Enter your topic and create your free preview in 15 minutes. {noApiCostClaim}, no credit card required.

items.0: AI-powered draft, cover, and content ready
items.1: Free preview — unlock full access when you like it

showcase.title: Ejemplos de Libros Generados por IA
showcase.description: Cada uno pasó de resumen de tema a borrador, de borrador a flujo de trabajo EPUB y PDF. Puedes comenzar tu propio libro esta semana con el mismo proceso.
